seasonal_patterns.description: Regular 3-day oscillation pattern with temperatures rising for two days then dipping slightly, overlaid on a strong upward seasonal trend.
Strong warming trend from spring (~5C) to summer (~32C) over the 90-day period.

anomalies.explanation: Day 16 shows a sudden cold snap dropping to 2.1C from 12.0C the previous day, a dramatic 10-degree drop likely caused by a cold front.
